problem_solved: Rural and remote communities lack rapid access to critical care transport for time-sensitive medical emergencies and trauma cases
solution_description: Air medical transport provider (part of PHI Group) operating helicopter air ambulance services across multiple US states. Specialized critical care transport with experienced flight crews including nurses and paramedics. Inter-facility and scene call capabilities
notes: Major US air ambulance operator alongside Air Methods. Infrastructure service rather than software. Medium Varden fit - transport logistics provider.
